sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hop (event_time DateTime, value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT hopStart(event_time, INTERVAL '1' HOUR, INTERVAL '6' HOURS) FROM test_hop;
UPDATE test_hop SET value = value + 10 WHERE hopStart(event_time, INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '1' WEEK) < now();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_hop WHERE hopStart(event_time, INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, INTERVAL '5' MINUTES) < now();
